TEXT:

records.delta_text: After completing its experiments, it is said that both ships were engaged in continuous intercollegiate communication across numerous continents for several weeks; while this study may have been incomplete (it's now well over six months since an official report has reached out to Google). At least one of those observations came before "an international company" or two—including CTO Michael Stacey (who was previously chief economist at Cisco), who became CEO back then.
